system.description: *Triggered when an ally within 60 feet is reduced to 0 HP.* Capture a resonant impression of their Echomind in a prepared container you carry. The soul passes normally, but the impression is a perfect record of who they were at the moment of death — their knowledge, personality, history. Usable for testimony, resurrection assistance, or continued consultation. Additionally, the dying ally gains Regen 2 for their next 2 turns if they survive (stabilize at 1 HP rather than dying, once per combat for this ally).
